response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Spoken audio phonetically matches the Japanese lyrics provided in the Reference JSON. 2. JSON Usage: The JSON was fully utilized for accurate transcription and translation. Manual timing was performed for vocal bursts and visual text elements. 3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles include the prominent intro title card and the 'CCGG Theater' text card. Vocal timing begins at 04:10.7. Applied aggressive end-time truncation and instantaneous transitions for the rapid-fire lyric sections to maintain synchronization with the fast-paced song.

subtitles.original: T.A.N. The Autofister Network 3D LIVE
subtitles.english: [Title: T.A.N. The Autofister Network 3D LIVE]

subtitles.original: CCGG 劇場
subtitles.english: [Title: CCGG Theater]

subtitles.original: 曖昧３センチ そりゃぷにってコトかい？ ちょっ！
subtitles.english: Around 3 centimeters, and that's squishy? Wait!

subtitles.original: らっぴんぐが制服…だぁぁ不利ってこたない ぷ。
subtitles.english: My wrapping is a uniform... there's no disadvantage to it, pbbth.

subtitles.original: がんばっちゃ▼やっちゃっちゃ
subtitles.english: I'll give it my best, I'll do it.

subtitles.original: そんときゃーっち＆Release ぎョッ
subtitles.english: In times like that, it's catch & release, gyo!

subtitles.original: 汗（Fuu）々（Fuu）の谷間に Darlin' darlin' F R E E Z E!!
subtitles.english: In the gap between drops of sweat, darlin' darlin' F R E E Z E!!

subtitles.original:
もってけ！セーラーふく
Lyrics: 畑 亜貴 Music: 神前 暁
subtitles.english:
[Song: Motteke! Sailor Fuku]
[Lyrics: Aki Hata / Music: Satoru Kosaki]

subtitles.original: なんかダるー なんかデるー
subtitles.english: I feel kinda sluggish, I feel kinda out of it.

subtitles.original: あいしテるー あれ一個が違ってるんるー
subtitles.english: I love you; what's that? One piece is different?

subtitles.original: なやみン坊ー 高鉄棒ー
subtitles.english: Worry-wart, high bar.

subtitles.original: おいしん簿ー いーかげんにシナサイ
subtitles.english: Gourmet, cut it out.

subtitles.original: 飛んでったアイツの火照るカラダって
subtitles.english: About the flushed body of that girl who jumped,

subtitles.original: 所謂ふつーのおにゃのコ
subtitles.english: she's just a so-called "normal" girl.

subtitles.original: 驚いたあたしだけ？
subtitles.english: Am I the only one who was surprised?

subtitles.original: 豚骨ハリガネおかわりだだだ
subtitles.english: Another helping of pig bone wires.

subtitles.original: BON-BON おーえん団
subtitles.english: BON-BON, we're cheerleaders.

subtitles.original: Let's get! チェリーパイ
subtitles.english: Let's get! Cherry pie.

subtitles.original: RAN-RAN かんげー会
subtitles.english: RAN-RAN, a welcome party.

subtitles.original: Look up! せんせーしょん
subtitles.english: Look up! Sensation.

subtitles.original: はい! 存在感‥小惑星
subtitles.english: Yeah! The feeling of existence... asteroids.
